case_title: BHAVNA SHAH VS. JAMES DARLING et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DARLING, JAMES MABURY, SHELLEY SUED AS SHELLY MABURY
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-26-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON MAR-26-2003 IN DEPT. 218 - STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF BHAVNA SHAH AND AGIANST JAMES DARLING AND SHELLEY MABURY. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR THE POSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 725 GEARY STREET #LL WRIT OF POSESSION TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED TO 5:00 PM. APRIL 8, 2003. IF DEFENDANTS DO NOT LEAVE BY THAT TIME, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $1700 AND DAMAGES OF $42.85 PER DAY FROM MARCH 3, 2003 THROUGH APRIL 8, 2003, WITH COSTS OF $207.30 FOR A TOTAL OF $3492.75 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) JPT GILBERT JAY, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (501A)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAH, BHAVNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MABURY, SHELLEY SUED AS SHELLY MABURY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 725 GEARY STREET #11, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-08-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, FOR DETAILS SEE SCANNED DOC
